title: salix brachycarpa var. brachycarpa
intro: Salix brachycarpa var. brachycarpa, also known as dwarf pussy willow, is a shrub or small tree species belonging to the willow family (Salicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Salix brachycarpa var. brachycarpa include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Salix brachycarpa var. brachycarpa can be prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its bark, leaves, or flowers, or by using the plant's extract in capsule or tincture form.
